properties.raw_text:
Finecut System
Sector Name: Dorian Sector
Faction: Independent
Description: Finecut is an asteroid-rich system whose independent workshops specialize in low-volume components, surgical instruments, and high-tolerance machine parts. Its settlements are distributed among hollowed rocks and linked by scheduled freight tugs rather than permanent passenger routes.

properties.raw_text:
Anthelion Triple System
Sector Name: Anthelion Sector
Faction: Unaffiliated
Description: Anthelion is a trinary system whose shifting stellar alignments produce severe seasonal extremes across its surviving planets. The resource-rich world Anthelion-IV repeatedly loses portions of its atmosphere during close orbital passages, preventing any permanent settlement from surviving without constant reconstruction.

properties.raw_text:
Skewglass System
Sector Name: Anthelion Sector
Faction: Unaffiliated
Description: Skewglass contains a rocky planet trapped in a highly eccentric orbit around a close binary pair. Its surface alternates between centuries of deep freeze and brief periods of intense melting, leaving vast glass plains where mineral-rich floods repeatedly evaporate.

properties.raw_text:
Varin System
Sector Name: Rimeward Sector
Faction: Independent
Description: Varin is a cold gas-giant system whose tidally heated moon contains a deep subsurface ocean and extensive geothermal caverns. Independent cooperatives operate beneath the ice, harvesting biological compounds and volatile chemicals while maintaining strict limits on drilling near native ecosystems.

properties.raw_text:
Pale Hearth System
Sector Name: Rimeward Sector
Faction: Independent
Description: Pale Hearth is a brown-dwarf system centered on a modest refueling colony built inside the hollowed moon Cask. The settlement processes hydrogen and deuterium from surrounding ice bodies, supplying isolated communities that cannot afford regular League tanker service.

properties.raw_text:
Cresset Remnant System
Sector Name: Cresset Sector
Faction: Unaffiliated
Description: Cresset Remnant surrounds a white dwarf with the exposed cores of several planets destroyed during the star’s expansion. Heavy metals are abundant across the debris belts, but intense radiation and high-velocity fragments make permanent extraction uneconomical.

properties.raw_text:
Sable Core System
Sector Name: Cresset Sector
Faction: Unaffiliated
Description: Sable Core contains a dense metallic planet whose outer layers were stripped away when its star entered the giant phase. The remaining world rotates rapidly and produces a magnetic field strong enough to interfere with navigation throughout the inner system.

properties.raw_text:
Nanshi Crown System
Sector Name: Nanshi Shoals
Faction: Independent
Description: Nanshi Crown is a young orange-star system surrounded by dense asteroid families and several partially formed worlds. Independent prospectors maintain mobile camps inside the larger rocks, while the station Crown Camp serves as a temporary exchange for claims, fuel, and collision forecasts.

properties.raw_text:
Lantern Shoal System
Sector Name: Nanshi Shoals
Faction: Independent
Description: Lantern Shoal is an unstable protoplanetary system where glowing dust clouds and frequent impacts make optical navigation unusually difficult. A chain of independent beacon stations marks the safest passages, relocating whenever orbital changes render their previous positions unsafe.

properties.raw_text:
Vesper Null System
Sector Name: Vesper Plain Sector
Faction: Unaffiliated
Description: Vesper Null consists of a solitary brown dwarf with two cold gas giants and a sparse family of irregular moons. It is chiefly notable as a navigational landmark in a region where comparable reference points may be several light-years apart.

properties.raw_text:
Candle End System
Sector Name: Vesper Plain Sector
Faction: Unaffiliated
Description: Candle End is a dying red dwarf orbited by a single frozen terrestrial world and a distant debris ring. The star emits too little energy to support practical settlement, though its predictable output makes the system useful for calibrating long-range instruments.

properties.raw_text:
Yanshen System
Sector Name: Yanshen Sector
Faction: Unaffiliated
Description: Yanshen is dominated by a magnetar whose periodic bursts saturate the surrounding region with radiation and magnetic interference. Its few surviving planets follow distant, distorted orbits, and all observation is conducted through expendable probes launched between flare cycles.

properties.raw_text:
Black Reed System
Sector Name: Yanshen Sector
Faction: Unaffiliated
Description: Black Reed lies near the outer edge of Yanshen’s magnetic influence and contains a cold gas giant with a long chain of narrow, irregular moons. Their mineral composition is unremarkable, but their orbital motion provides useful data on the magnetar’s long-term gravitational effects.

properties.raw_text:
New Caradene System
Sector Name: Caradene Sector
Faction: Independent
Description: New Caradene orbits a temperate yellow star and contains several worlds with dense, chemically hostile atmospheres. Elevated sealed habitats above Caradene-II’s chlorine seas form the sector’s largest colony, exporting pharmaceuticals, industrial catalysts, and atmospheric-processing expertise.

properties.raw_text:
Palisade Sea System
Sector Name: Caradene Sector
Faction: Independent
Description: Palisade Sea contains a warm ocean world beneath an atmosphere rich in sulfur compounds and corrosive aerosols. Independent researchers occupy shielded platforms above the cloud layer, studying extremophile life and testing materials intended for hostile-atmosphere construction.

properties.raw_text:
Lumen Deep System
Sector Name: Lumen Verge
Faction: Unaffiliated
Description: Lumen Deep is embedded within the densest portion of the sector’s interstellar dust cloud, leaving its red dwarf almost invisible beyond the system boundary. Its planets are cold, dark, and difficult to survey, with navigation dependent on radio beacons deployed by temporary scientific expeditions.

properties.raw_text:
Blindstar System
Sector Name: Lumen Verge
Faction: Unaffiliated
Description: Blindstar contains a dim brown dwarf surrounded by frozen moons and dust-darkened debris. The system is notable for a broad region of electrically charged particles that distort optical and radar returns without posing any direct biological threat.

properties.raw_text:
Xiang System
Sector Name: Qilin Reach
Faction: Independent
Description: Xiang is an ocean-world system whose inhabited research habitats orbit a tidally heated moon beneath hundreds of kilometers of high-pressure ice. Scientists study extremophile ecosystems and unusual pressure-formed minerals while relying on imported food, reactor components, and replacement machinery.

properties.raw_text:
Longwater System
Sector Name: Qilin Reach
Faction: Independent
Description: Longwater contains two massive ocean worlds with deep atmospheres and no exposed land. Independent survey stations operate in high orbit, deploying pressure-resistant probes into the upper seas and recovering biological samples from depths unreachable by crewed vessels.

properties.raw_text:
Pavan Cross System
Sector Name: Pavan Sector
Faction: Independent
Description: Pavan Cross is a quiet gas-giant system whose primary station serves as a neutral transfer point for explorers, pilgrims, and long-distance freight crews. Its economy depends on docking fees, cargo exchange, basic repairs, and the continued willingness of larger powers to ignore it.

properties.raw_text:
Aster Vale System
Sector Name: Pavan Sector
Faction: Independent
Description: Aster Vale contains several small airless moons and a thin asteroid belt with modest deposits of industrial metals. A loose community of independent prospectors operates from the station Valehouse, using Pavan Cross for heavy repairs and external trade.

properties.raw_text:
Helian Oldlight System
Sector Name: Helian Waste
Faction: Unaffiliated
Description: Helian Oldlight is an ancient, low-metallicity star surrounded by small gas worlds, frozen moons, and mineral-poor rocky bodies. The system offers an unusually clear example of planetary formation before heavy elements became common, making it scientifically valuable despite its negligible commercial worth.

properties.raw_text:
Dust Testament System
Sector Name: Helian Waste
Faction: Unaffiliated
Description: Dust Testament contains a dim red star and a broad disk of fine silicate material that never accumulated into full planets. Automated surveys have found little iron, nickel, or other useful metals, leaving the system untouched except for occasional astronomical missions.

properties.description: An old, dim red dwarf whose low output leaves most of the system frozen.

properties.description: A broad outer region of dust, gas, and planetary embryos still undergoing active accretion.
properties.body: A broad outer region of dust, gas, and planetary embryos still undergoing active accretion.

properties.description: The hotter member of a close binary pair, drawing material from its companion.
properties.body: The hotter member of a close binary pair, drawing material from its companion.

properties.description: A bright white companion distorted by mass transfer and irregular ultraviolet flares.
properties.body: A bright white companion distorted by mass transfer and irregular ultraviolet flares.

properties.body: A fractured moon containing deep deposits of hydrated minerals.

properties.body: A quiet, cold red dwarf with predictable output and very weak flaring.

properties.description: An airless inner planet covered in ancient impact scars and navigation monuments.
properties.body: An airless inner planet covered in ancient impact scars and navigation monuments.

properties.body: The inhabited outer moon carrying the final calibrated beacon before Far Meridian’s longest transit gap.

properties.description: A narrow, elongated moon used to verify local orbital timing.
properties.body: A narrow, elongated moon used to verify local orbital timing.

properties.body: A remote frozen world beyond the beacon community and the last charted body in the system.

properties.body: A dark, slowly tumbling world whose orbit changes measurably over a human lifetime.

properties.body: A cold captured gas giant moving on a steeply inclined orbit.
